hooks.command: prompt=$(jq -r '.prompt // ""'); echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(apply|applying|application)\b' && jq -nc '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"UserPromptSubmit",additionalContext:"Before recommending or generating any apply packet, dedupe by company across ALL statuses in data/applications.md — run grep -i {company} data/applications.md and check for prior Applied/Rejected/Discarded rows. A prior Applied row means in-flight, do not re-apply."}}' || true
